statusLine.command: jq -r '"CWD: \(.workspace.current_dir) | Model: \(.model.display_name)" + (if .context_window.used_percentage then " | Context Usage: \(.context_window.used_percentage)%" else "" end) + (if .rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage then " | 5h: \(.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage | round)%" else "" end) + (if .rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage then " | 7d: \(.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage | round)%" else "" end)'
